summary: After compaction, verify your active plan and todo list are still in context before continuing
problem: You resume after compaction and start working, but the plan you were following got summarized away and you drift off-track
solution: After any compaction event, explicitly check: what task was I on, what is the next step, and is my todo list still accurate. Re-read the plan file if needed before touching any code
root_cause: Compaction summarizes conversation history aggressively; structured task lists and multi-step plans are often collapsed into a single sentence in the summary
